author: tmiychao
content:
The time has come for your first real updates! Take your time this week to do the research, explore protocol domains and proposed project. You don't have to rush to submitting it now but by end of the week after you took your time, please report how the week has been going for you. 

Share your updates in this thread directly with short one sentence summary and add it to the table in github of course https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/blob/main/development-updates.md

author: owanikin
content:
Hello everyone, happy to be here! Here is my week1 update. 
https://hackmd.io/@ZpBFaS-NSO-5Xkdm4jwolg/BJO7iYpWMx

The project I am most interested in is **Reth Partial Statefulness and State Expiry Prototype**. It aligns especially with my work, as someone who has tried writing an EL. Looking forward to learning and working with you all. Cheers!
